gpu_info.gpu_name: NVIDIA RTX PRO 4000 Blackwell Generation Laptop GPU

prompts.prompt: Check this button for accessibility: <button style='background: #777; color: #999'>Submit</button>

judge.reason: Check this button for accessibility: <button style='backgrou: F — The button fails accessibility standards due to insufficient color contrast. The text color (#999) against the background color (#777) results in a contrast ratio of approximately 1.3:1, which is well below the WCAG AA minimum requirement of 4.5:1 for normal text. This makes the button unreadable for users with visual impairments or low vision.
